name: CompTIA Data+
notes: V1 (DA0-001) retires April 14 2026 English. V2 launched Oct 2025 with AI/cloud topics. 675/900 passing. ~$253 retail; 50% academic discount.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: Data Analytics
notes: SAS-endorsed. Entry-level; designed for HS. ~$100 voucher. 5-year validity from June 2025.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: Artificial Intelligence
notes: SAS-endorsed. Entry-level AI concepts exam. ~$100 voucher. 5-year validity.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: Python
notes: Cross-cuts with Software Solutions. Foundational Python; not DS-specific. 5-year validity.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: Databases
notes: SAS-endorsed. SQL/relational DB focus. Supportive but not anchor for DS/AI.

name: PCEP - Certified Entry-Level Python Programmer
notes: Entry-level Python. $59 retail. Cross-cuts with software dev. 70% passing.

name: PCAP - Certified Associate Python Programmer
notes: Intermediate Python including OOP. 700/1000 passing. More advanced than PCEP.

name: PCED - Certified Entry-Level Data Analyst with Python
notes: NEW credential — data analytics focus using Python. $59 retail. 75% passing. Covers data collection/cleaning/analysis.

name: Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Fundamentals
notes: RETIRING June 30 2026 — replaced by AI-901. Free vouchers via Virtual Training Days. 700/1000 passing.

name: Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Fundamentals (Refreshed)
notes: Successor to AI-900. Beta April 2026; GA expected June 2026. Adds GenAI/Azure OpenAI content. Not yet on any state list.

name: Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Fundamentals
notes: Free vouchers via MS Learn / Virtual Training Days. Core data concepts + Azure services. 700/1000 passing.

name: Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate
notes: Associate-level; targets 1-2 years experience. $165 exam. Annual renewal.

name: AWS Certified AI Practitioner
notes: Launched Aug 2024. Foundational AI/ML/GenAI credential. AWS Educate for ages 13+. $100 exam. 700/1000 passing.

name: AWS Certified Machine Learning Engineer - Associate
notes: Requires 1+ year ML experience. $150 exam. Too advanced for most HS.

name: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate
notes: ACE-recommended for college credit. ~$49/mo Coursera. No proctored exam.

name: Google Advanced Data Analytics Professional Certificate
notes: Builds on Google Data Analytics cert. ML/predictive modeling focus. Not proctored.

name: Google AI Essentials
notes: Under 10 hours. GenAI/prompting focus. Very accessible for HS. $49 one-time. No proctored exam.

name: Google AI Professional Certificate
notes: Launched 2025. 7 modules. AI productivity/prompting focus. Very new; not yet on state lists.

name: IBM Data Science Professional Certificate
notes: 12-course program. Python/SQL/ML focus. Credly badge. No proctored exam. Better for PS.

name: IBM Applied AI Professional Certificate
notes: Covers AI/ML/NLP/Watson. Credly badge. No proctored exam.

name: IBM SkillsBuild: Artificial Intelligence Fundamentals
notes: FREE. Designed for HS students. Credly badge. Not proctored.

name: IBM SkillsBuild: Data Fundamentals
notes: FREE. Designed for HS. Covers data concepts/tools. Ohio recognizes some IBM SkillsBuild badges at 1 point.

name: Salesforce Certified Tableau Desktop Foundations
notes: $100 exam. 70% passing. Entry-level Tableau/data viz.

name: Salesforce Certified Tableau Data Analyst
notes: $250 exam. Too advanced for most HS.

name: Databricks Generative AI Fundamentals Accreditation
notes: FREE. Non-proctored accreditation. 70% passing. Not on state lists.

name: Databricks Certified Machine Learning Associate
notes: $200 exam. Requires Python/ML experience. Too advanced for HS.

name: Databricks Certified Generative AI Engineer Associate
notes: $200 exam. LLM/RAG/agent focus. PS only.

name: SnowPro Core Certification
notes: $175 exam. Platform-specific. Too niche for HS CTE.

name: SAS Certified Specialist: Base Programming Using SAS 9.4
notes: Performance-based exam (coding). Requires SAS software access. PS-level.

name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure AI Foundations Associate
notes: 65% passing. 15 attempts allowed. Free training via Oracle MyLearn.

name: CompTIA DataSys+
notes: Database administration focus. 2-3 years experience target. Not a strong DS/AI anchor.

name: DataCamp Data Analyst Associate
notes: SQL-focused exam. $149/year subscription required. Not widely recognized on state lists.

name: Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Scientist Associate
notes: RETIRING June 1 2026. Associate-level requiring significant ML experience. $165 exam.
